description: Buffer overflow via gets() + false positive rejection for safe memcpy

sast_findings.message: gets(): Does not check for buffer overflows. Use fgets() instead.
Possible buffer overflow with memcpy. Ensure destination buffer is large enough.

threat_context.title: Buffer Copy without Checking Size of Input ('Classic Buffer Overflow')

must_reject.reason: memcpy is bounded by sizeof(dest) - safe
